headline: PepsiCo Bottling Shift In Northern Europe And What It Means For Valuation
summary: PepsiCo plans to end its bottling and distribution partnership with Royal Unibrew in Denmark, Finland, and the Baltic states in 2028. The change will affect how PepsiCo products are produced and distributed across key Northern European markets. The company will need to put new arrangements in place for local production, supply chains, and customer relationships once the agreement concludes. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:PEP, this development sits alongside a share price of $155.29 and a...
